calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT CROWN ENERGY SERVICES, INC.'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Cross-Defendant Crown Energy Services, Inc.'s motion for determination of good faith of its settlement with plaintiff Liberty Mutual Fire Insurance Company is granted. The settlement is in good faith based on the factors enumerated in Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward-Clyde & Assoc., (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488. Because there is no admissible evidence supporting the imposition of liability against Able, the settlement amount is not grossly disproportionate to a reasonable assessment of Able's liability. There is no admissible evidence that the dislodgement of the roofing substance was caused by Able's employee Mr. Lent or that Able's acts or omissions in inspecting the roof for debris were a substantial factor for the clogging of the roof drains. The declaration of Blue Roofing's expert lacks foundation regarding causation of the substance dislodgement. Nor has Blue Roofing shown that Liberty Mutual and Able colluded to shift liability to it. Blue Roofing's collusion argument is premised on the unsubstantiated assumption that the settlement amount is unreasonably low.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
